lesson.title: CAPS.Mathematics.Gr11.PROB.1: Dependent and independent events. Product rule. Tree diag...
lesson.explanation: Grade 10 probability introduces Venn diagrams for representing two events. Mutually exclusive events cannot happen at the same time: P(A and B) = 0. Complementary events: P(not A) = 1 - P(A). The addition rule: P(A or B) = P(A) + P(B) - P(A and B). For mutually exclusive events, the last term is zero.

flashcards.back: Independent events: P(A and B) = P(A) × P(B)
